Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I can't believe how easy it was to sneak up on you. Is the rest of your team this oblivious?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Dammit... I can't fight back like this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I want you to do something for me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I have orders for you to pass along to your team.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}You can at least communicate with them, can't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Do as I say, and you won't be harmed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}All you have to do is call off your operation. Easy, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}And not just the one tonight... All of them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}You want me to cancel the operation...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}No way... You're not one of "them," are you?[n]{f 1 1}
